name: ida_get_callers
description: Call-graph callers (direct calls). Default max_results=80 to limit large fan-in; use max_results=0 for all callers. Plugin v2+ enforces the cap.

max_results.title: Max Results
max_results.description: 1–50000 caps the list; 0 means unlimited (requires plugin honoring max_results).

result.title: Result
result.description: Markdown: Target, Count (total), optional Returned (after cap) when truncated, then bullet list. Legacy plugins may append a note that max_results was ignored.
